sentence: 看到那道菜，她不由地笑了。
pinyin: Kàn dào nà dào cài, tā bùyóu de xiào le.
english: Seeing that dish, she couldn't help smiling.
She practices calligraphy every single day.

sentence: 这位学者发表了一篇重要论文。
pinyin: Zhè wèi xuézhě fābiǎo le yī piān zhòngyào lùnwén.
english: This scholar published an important paper.

sentence: 驾车前要了解当地的交通法规。
pinyin: Jià chē qián yào liǎo jiě dāng dì de jiāo tōng fǎ guī.
english: Before driving, you should familiarize yourself with local traffic regulations.

sentence: 不少网友在评论区留言支持她。
pinyin: Bù shǎo wǎng yǒu zài píng lùn qū liú yán zhī chí tā.
english: Quite a few netizens left comments in the comments section to support her.
